title: eurybia chasei
side_effects: Eurybia chasei can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea and vomiting, due to its potential to interact with other medications or exacerbate existing digestive problems. In some cases, excessive consumption of the plant may also lead to allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, or respiratory issues. Additionally, using the plant for extended periods or in high doses may cause dizziness, headaches, or changes in blood pressure, highlighting the importance of proper dosage and supervision. It is crucial to consult a healthcare professional before using Eurybia chasei, especially for individuals with pre-existing health conditions or those taking prescription medications.
